episodes.description: Decades after being presumed dead, Keiko’s return shocks Monarch. Cate defies orders to save Shaw—and unleashes a terrifying new Titan.
episodes.title: Cause and Effect

episodes.description: Lee and Keiko investigate a secretive village with a cult devoted to a mysterious creature. Cate crosses paths with a deadly stowaway.
episodes.title: Resonance

episodes.description: Shaw, Keiko, Hiroshi, and Kentaro go rogue in an attempt to find Titan X. Cate struggles with feelings of guilt. A buried secret is exposed.
episodes.title: Secrets

episodes.description: To get Hiroshi’s device back, Shaw and the team execute a daring heist at Apex Cybernetics.
episodes.title: Trespass

episodes.description: In Santa Soledad, Titan X becomes a target for Apex, forcing Shaw and the Randas to infiltrate the covert experiment.
episodes.title: Furusato

episodes.description: Shaw and Suzuki test a “Titan phone” designed to summon Godzilla, triggering an unforeseen event that puts Shaw in the path of his own past.
episodes.title: Requiem

episodes.description: Shaw receives an impossible radio transmission. Cate and Keiko uncover an ancient link to Titan X. Isabel has a proposition for Kentaro.
episodes.title: String Theory

episodes.description: Titan X makes landfall in Australia, where Shaw lures Godzilla into a showdown. Isabel uses the battle as a distraction for her secret operation.
episodes.title: Separate Ways

episodes.description: Monarch and the team head to Skull Island. Cate tries to reason with Kentaro and stop Isabel. Shaw and Keiko search for Billy’s long-lost rift.
episodes.title: Ends of the Earth

episodes.description: Season finale. Kong and Titan X face off in a colossal clash that threatens to reshape Skull Island. Shaw embarks on a dangerous journey.
episodes.title: Where We Belong
